notes: Hopkinton MA (Middlesex) — MAPC layer 2 (strip ^139). Parcels carry assessor sub-codes (A2/RA1/RB2/OSLP) so a spatial rebind cleans them to bylaw districts. MAPC codes match the CURRENT Ch.210 bylaw (2023 ed., ehop.org): A=Agriculture, B/BD/BR=Business, IA/IB=Industrial A/B, OP=Office Park, P=Professional Office, RA/RB/RLF=Residence. Vocab-vs-bylaw check via gate-a.
